guidedLearning.title: Guided Learning
guidedLearning.tooltip: Sen, acting as a teacher, helps you understand concepts step-by-step, explains clearly with examples, and adjusts to your level.

quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.tooltip: Sen, acting as an examiner, asks appropriate questions to assess your understanding and provides short feedback after each answer.

messages.welcome: Hello! I am Sen assistant. I will guide you to explore Vietnam's cultural heritage! 🌸
messages.defaultError: Sorry, I cannot answer this question right now.

explainMore.label: Explain more
explainMore.prompt: Can you explain more about this content?

switchCharacter.title: Switch Character
switchCharacter.desc1: Since each character has a different personality, we have designed separate chat sessions for each.
switchCharacter.desc2: If you switch to {newChar}, your current conversation with {oldChar} will be saved.
